headline: Conagra (CAG): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Although the S&P 500 is down 2.1% over the past six months, Conagra’s stock price has fallen further to $15.60, losing shareholders 16.6% of their capital. This might have investors contemplating their next move.
